title: Care Ratings Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Care Ratings Capital India is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Credit Analyst with drive and ambition, Care Ratings Capital India in Meerut is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Care Ratings Capital India:
Care Ratings Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SQL

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Care Ratings Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
